'''De-Purteen''' was the capital city of [[Ord Cantrell/Legends|Ord Cantrell]] and hosted many famous resorts. Following the final death of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], De-Purteen served as the capital of the [[Crimson Empire]], which was controlled at that time by the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'' {{C|Weather report list only}}
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] {{1st}}
